mapper.select:
select FAQ_GB , QSTN_CONTS , ANSR_CONTS , USE_YN , REG_ID , REG_DTM , MOD_ID , MOD_DTM , FAQ_SEQ from T_FAQ_TRAN where 1=1
AND FAQ_GB = #{searchGb}
AND (QSTN_CONTS LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchText}, '%') OR ANSR_CONTS LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchText}, '%'))
AND FAQ_GB = #{searchGb} AND (QSTN_CONTS LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchText}, '%') OR ANSR_CONTS LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchText}, '%'))
order by MOD_DTM DESC
select FAQ_GB , QSTN_CONTS , ANSR_CONTS , USE_YN , REG_ID , REG_DTM , MOD_ID , MOD_DTM , FAQ_SEQ from T_FAQ_TRAN where 1=1 and FAQ_SEQ = #{faqSeq}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_FAQ_TRAN (FAQ_GB , QSTN_CONTS , ANSR_CONTS , USE_YN , REG_ID , REG_DTM , MOD_ID , MOD_DTM ) VALUES ( #{faqGb}, #{qstnConts}, #{ansrConts}, #{useYn}, 'admin', now(), 'admin', now() )
mapper.update: UPDATE T_FAQ_TRAN SET QSTN_CONTS = #{qstnConts}, ANSR_CONTS = #{ansrConts}, USE_YN = #{useYn}, MOD_ID = 'admin' , MOD_DTM = now() where 1=1 and FAQ_SEQ = #{faqSeq}
UPDATE T_FAQ_TRAN SET USE_YN = 'N', MOD_ID = 'admin', MOD_DTM = now() where 1=1 And FAQ_SEQ = #{faqSeq}
mapper.select:
Select A.ASQ_SEQ , A.USER_UUID , B.USER_NM , B.GENDER , B.BIRTH , A.QSTN_TITL , A.QSTN_CONTS , A.QSTN_YMD , A.ANSR_CONTS , A.ANSR_YN From T_ASQ_TRAN A , T_USER_TRAN B where 1=1 AND A.USER_UUID = B.USER_UUID
AND (QSTN_TITL LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchText}, '%'))
order by QSTN_YMD DESC
Select ASQ_SEQ , USER_UUID , QSTN_TITL , QSTN_CONTS , QSTN_YMD , ANSR_CONTS , ANSR_YN From T_ASQ_TRAN where 1=1 and ASQ_SEQ = #{asqSeq}
mapper.update: UPDATE T_ASQ_TRAN SET QSTN_TITL = #{qstnTitl}, QSTN_CONTS = #{qstnConts}, ANSR_CONTS = #{ansrConts}, ANSR_YN = #{ansrYn}, QSTN_YMD = NOW() where 1=1 and ASQ_SEQ = #{asqSeq}
mapper.select: Select ASQ_SEQ , USER_UUID , QSTN_TITL , QSTN_CONTS , QSTN_YMD , ANSR_CONTS , ANSR_YN From T_ASQ_TRAN where USER_UUID = #{userUuid} order by QSTN_YMD DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_ASQ_TRAN ( USER_UUID , QSTN_TITL , QSTN_CONTS , QSTN_YMD , ANSR_YN ) VALUES ( #{userUuid} , #{qstnTitl} , #{qstnConts} , NOW() , 'N' )
